element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls marker along playfield edges with joystick; learns directional movement before drawing
Drawing lines in unclaimed territory to create closed shapes; worth double points; teaches core loop
Alternative drawing speed with standard point value; introduces risk/reward decision-making
Abstract entity with unpredictable motion; collision while drawing = life loss; teaches avoidance timing
Triggered when marker stops drawing; burns along line toward marker; introduces time pressure element
Traverse playfield edges; collision = life loss; meter tracks release of additional Sparx
Two Qixes in single playfield; must split them into separate regions to complete level; introduces bonus multiplier system
Sparx transform into faster, smarter variants that can chase marker along uncompleted Stix; escalates difficulty

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching 75% playfield threshold to complete level
Marker returning safely to playfield edge
typical_tension_triggers: Qix moving toward player's uncompleted Stix
Fuse appearing and burning toward marker
Marker trapped in spiral (cannot proceed further)
Marker drawing in open territory with multiple threats active
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tension with cumulative threat introduction; levels build difficulty through multiple simultaneous hazards rather than linear progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Single Qix with basic Sparx; focus on learning draw mechanics and avoidance patterns; 75% completion threshold
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased Sparx count and release frequency; fuse timing becomes more challenging; bonus multiplier introduced at Level 3 with dual Qix
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dual or multiple Qixes; Super Sparx variants that chase along uncompleted lines; combination of simultaneous threats; higher playfield percentage requirements possible
notable_spikes: Level 3: Introduction of dual Qix mechanic and bonus multiplier system
Super Sparx mutation point: Sparx transition from edge-only movement to line-tracking capability
Cumulative point: Late levels with multiple Super Sparx + dual Qixes create compounding difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels (1-2) focus on capturing area percentages while avoiding single Qix; marker must draw closed shapes without collision during line creation
From Level 3 onward, player must strategically split playfield into two regions, each containing one Qix; completion triggers bonus multiplier escalation
Multiple hazard types operate simultaneously: Qix movement, Sparx patrol, fuse mechanics, and Super Sparx chasing; creates compound decision-making complexity
